contentPattern.structure: year-navigation list (anchor scroll) + repeating chronological entries; each entry = year label + image + heading + paragraph, alternating image-left/image-right

suitableFor: brand-history / chronological timeline sections with an anchor year (or milestone) navigation and one image+heading+text entry per point in time
any milestone list where entries alternate image and text sides and are jump-linked from a nav
notSuitableFor: simple image + text card grids (use vanilla cards)
